# Cover Letter

February 26, 2026

Brandon Ginarte

55 Example Address Lane

Orlando, Florida 32817

(###) ### - ####

Recruiting Manager

Leidos U.S.A Branch

1750 Presidents Street

Reston, VA 20190

Dear Recruiting Manger,

I am writing to apply for the position of Cyber Security Engineer. Through extensive research I have concluded that Leidos could truly use my skills, values, and background. Your company's determination for cyber defense really speaks to me. I am convinced that I am a great choice for this position and would add great value to the company.

I am currently a Computer Science major at UCF. Additionally, I am working towards my A++ and Networking certification. My current coursework at UCF. It has helped to develop a well-rounded knowledge and skill set that perfectly fits the cyber security industry. I have taken classes using Python and C, while working towards other classes that teach AI proficiency.

I am part of UCF ROTC Detachment 159 as a first-year cadet. I will be a first Lieutenant under the cyber security defense program for Air Force. My detachment works with the community, academics, physical fitness, and with the US government. We have worked with local organizations to uplift our community with Air Force support. Additionally, the Air Force has helped me with resources with multiple internship organizations to make sure that I could have the best opportunity for experience.

Your company specializes with former Air Force veterans to provide the best cyber defense and this I fit perfectly. Your company's determination and competitiveness are a core value of mine. I really do admire your organization's determination to shine. My volunteer work has mainly been focused on community and helping people. My goal in life is to help people and with cyber I can help the world on a global level from theft. I truly believe my values and mentality fit perfect with Leidos core values.

I welcome the opportunity to further discuss my qualifications for this position. Thank you for your consideration.

Respectfully,

![alt text](sig.png)

Brandon J. Ginarte
